title: 书籍信息
completionRule: Complete only when every legacy field, translated-title rule, shared Info Panel action, lifecycle state, responsive geometry and bounded shared metadata contract has automated evidence.

sourceUiInventory.title: 名称、译名与条件原名
acceptanceItems: 优先显示非空 EMM translated_title
译名与原名不同才使用强调 chip
译名与原名不同才显示原名行

sourceUiInventory.title: 空数据与共享元数据生命周期
acceptanceItems: 无书籍信息时字段零 DOM

sourceUiInventory.title: Info Panel 共享路径动作
acceptanceItems: 信息 Panel 任意空白处右键
优先书籍路径并回退当前图像路径
无路径时定位动作禁用
ContextMenu 键与 Shift+F10 几何定位
点击外部或 Escape 关闭

sourceUiInventory.title: 通用 Card 外壳与布局状态
acceptanceItems: BookOpen 图标与书籍信息标题
动态 import 加载与失败状态

sourceUiInventory.title: EMM 与共享三端数据契约
acceptanceItems: 按规范书源路径精确读取旧 EMM 记录
翻页不重复读取静态 EMM
取消与 session 关闭释放

sourceUiInventory.title: XR 所有权与可访问性扩展
acceptanceItems: 源大小归 Storage Card 而非 Book Card
复制使用宿主 clipboard capability
系统定位通过受鉴权后端而非浏览器 shell
动作成功失败 live region
加载错误重试为显式扩展

items.title: 显示规范书籍名称
items.targetContract: The Card displays the current book display name with full-value tooltip and bounded wrapping.
items.notes: Original displayName remains the canonical fallback.

items.title: 优先显示有效 EMM 译名
items.targetContract: A bounded non-empty translated_title from the exact legacy EMM book record becomes the emphasized primary title.
items.notes: Raw emm_json and tags never cross the DTO.

items.title: 条件显示原名
items.targetContract: The original-name row appears only when the normalized translated title differs from displayName.
items.notes: Equal, empty or malformed translations do not duplicate the name.

items.title: 显示规范书源路径
items.targetContract: The Card exposes the canonical opened book source path, not an uncommitted input value or archive entry path.
items.notes: Long and UNC paths must wrap without horizontal overflow.

items.title: 保留完整书源类型语义
items.targetContract: folder, archive, PDF, EPUB, media, image and unknown sources have stable shared type semantics and legacy labels.
items.notes: Document format must not collapse to a generic document label.

items.title: 显示 1-based 当前页与总页数
items.targetContract: Current page and page count derive from the active frame and update after navigation.

items.title: 计算有界一位小数进度
items.targetContract: Progress clamps current to total, renders one decimal for non-empty books and an em dash for zero pages.
items.notes: NaN, Infinity and values above 100% are forbidden.

items.title: 加载、空、错误与重试
items.targetContract: The Card has stable loading, empty, error and retry states and never presents stale book metadata as current.
items.notes: Loading/error/retry are intentional accessible target extensions.

items.title: Info Panel 共享复制与系统定位
items.targetContract: The whole Info Panel exposes copy-path and reveal-in-file-manager through host/backend capabilities with disabled, pending and feedback states.
items.notes: These actions belong to the Panel surface, not BookInformationCard.

items.title: 共享有界静态书籍元数据契约
items.targetContract: GUI, CLI and TUI share source identity, source format, page count and a bounded translated title loaded once per session book identity.
items.notes: No second NeoView database, raw EMM JSON or image decode path is introduced.

items.title: 会话切换、去重、取消与释放
items.targetContract: Hidden/unmounted Cards do no work; static book metadata is deduplicated; generation and session changes cannot publish stale values; close releases pending work.
items.notes: Page progress may change per frame without rereading EMM.

items.title: 共享 Card 外壳行为
items.targetContract: The Book Card remains independently lazy, collapsible, movable, resizable and window-capable while retaining its non-hideable legacy rule.
items.notes: Shared shell behavior needs Book registry and lazy-chunk evidence.

items.title: 仅持久化共享 Card 布局
items.targetContract: Book content has no settings; order, expanded state and height persist only through canonical [nodes.neoview] layout.
items.notes: No Reader business data is written to xiranite.db.

items.title: 语义字段与键盘等价动作
items.targetContract: Description fields, shell controls, retry and Info Panel actions have accessible names, keyboard operation, focus restoration and live feedback.
items.notes: ContextMenu/Shift+F10 uses target geometry rather than viewport origin.

items.title: 桌面与窄 Card 视觉几何
items.targetContract: Legacy labels, two-column density, conditional title chip and long values remain readable at desktop and 420x360 Card widths.
items.notes: Both viewports require zero horizontal overflow and screenshot evidence.

items.title: 常量 DOM、静态请求去重与独立 chunk
items.targetContract: O(1) DOM, zero hidden work, one bounded static EMM read per session book, shared frame metadata and an independent deferred Book Card chunk under 8 KiB.
items.notes: Book metadata must not scan a directory, read thumbnail blobs or refetch on page turns.

items.title: 记录所有权与可访问性扩展
items.targetContract: Document that source size remains Storage-owned and that host clipboard, authenticated reveal, loading/error/retry, semantic dl and action feedback replace weaker legacy behavior.
items.notes: No legacy Book field or Info Panel action may be silently removed.
